title: helichrysum helvolum
intro: Helichrysum helvolum, also known as the yellow-flowered helichrysum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum helvolum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in essential oils, teas, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
